category_sources: source_facts.description says it scans Software Bill of Materials for security vulnerabilities; official GitHub README describes vulnerability and license scanning of SBOMs.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/devops-kung-fu/bomber, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify SBOM vulnerability scanning; GitHub topics include security, devsecops, sbom, and vulnerability-scanners.
